name: team cpoe range year_offset pools weighted mean over window under wrap (executed-result parity)
description: Seed ZZ pass plays with cpoe 2.0 and 4.0 in 2024 and 6.0 in 2025. The AVG carve-out pools SUM(cpoe)/SUM(non-null dropbacks) over the offset window = 12.0/3 = 4.0 -- NOT the 2024-only mean (3.0) nor a sum of per-season means -- proving the num/den conversion spans both offset years under wrap mode.
expected_query: with "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(cpoe) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN cpoe IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_year_teams"."pid", sum(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator, sum(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator) as team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator from "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."team" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."nfl_team" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."year" group by "player_year_teams"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats.team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats WHERE tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats.pid = player.pid) AS "team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2025 where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(cpoe) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cpoe IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS team_completion_percentage_over_expected_from_plays_0 FROM nfl_plays WHERE off='ZZ' AND year IN (2024,2025) AND seas_type='REG' AND play_type <> 'NOPL'
